ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "fungus_type" TEXT /* Type of fungus used in the experiment */,
  "initial_population" INTEGER /* Initial population size of the fungus */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in hours */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary researcher conducting the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_replicates" (
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replicate */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this replicate belongs to */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the replicate */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population size of the fungus at the time of measurement */,
  "time_hours" INTEGER /* Time of measurement in hours */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the replicate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_replicates_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replicate this measurement belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population size of the fungus at the time of measurement */,
  "time_hours" INTEGER /* Time of measurement in hours */,
  "spores" INTEGER /* Number of spores at the time of measurement */,
  "vegetative_cells" INTEGER /* Number of vegetative cells at the time of measurement */,
  "vegetative_percent" REAL /* Percentage of vegetative cells at the time of measurement */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Calculated growth rate of the fungal population */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Any specific observations made during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_measurements_replicate_id FOREIGN KEY ("replicate_id") REFERENCES experiment_replicates ("replicate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fungus_types" (
  "fungus_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fungus type */,
  "fungus_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fungus type */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the fungus */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the fungus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fungus type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fungus_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental condition */,
  "default_unit" TEXT /* Default unit for the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_condition_values" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental condition for the experiment */,
  "measurement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_condition_units" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the environmental condition for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
